prompt: A document review flow: pick a client, look through their uploaded documents, and verify or reject each one with a note to the client.
wire:
export default function DocumentReviewFlow() { const [clients, setClients] = React.useState([]); const [selectedClientId, setSelectedClientId] = React.useState(null); const [documents, setDocuments] = React.useState([]); const [clientInfo, setClientInfo] = React.useState(null); const [loadingClients, setLoadingClients] = React.useState(true); const [loadingDocs, setLoadingDocs] = React.useState(false); const [actionState, setActionState] = React.useState({}); const [noteValues, setNoteValues] = React.useState({}); const [search, setSearch] = React.useState(""); React.useEffect(() => { tools.host_listClients({ filter: null, q: null }).then(res => { setClients(res.data || []); setLoadingClients(false); }); }, []); const filteredClients = React.useMemo(() => { if (!search.trim()) return clients; const q = search.toLowerCase(); return clients.filter(c => (c.name || "").toLowerCase().includes(q)); }, [clients, search]); function selectClient(client) { setSelectedClientId(client.id); setClientInfo(client); setDocuments([]); setActionState({}); setNoteValues({}); setLoadingDocs(true); tools.host_listClientDocuments({ id: client.id }).then(res => { setDocuments(res.data || []); setLoadingDocs(false); }); } async function handleVerify(doc) { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "pending" })); const res = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: selectedClientId, docId: doc.id, body: { action: "verify", fileName: doc.fileName || doc.file_name || "", reason: "" } }); if (res && res.status === "pending-approval") { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "awaiting-approval" })); } else { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "verified" })); setDocuments(prev => prev.map(d => d.id === doc.id ? { ...d, status: "verified" } : d)); } } async function handleReject(doc) { const reason = noteValues[doc.id] || ""; if (!reason.trim()) { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "needs-reason" })); return; } setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "pending" })); const res = await tools.host_setDocumentStatus({ id: selectedClientId, docId: doc.id, body: { action: "reject", fileName: doc.fileName || doc.file_name || "", reason } }); if (res && res.status === "pending-approval") { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "awaiting-approval" })); } else { setActionState(s => ({ ...s, [doc.id]: "rejected" })); setDocuments(prev => prev.map(d => d.id === doc.id ? { ...d, status: "missing", rejectionNote: reason } : d)); } } const reviewable = documents.filter(d => d.status === "received" || d.status === "needs_review"); const verified = documents.filter(d => d.status === "verified"); const missing = documents.filter(d => d.status === "missing"); const statusTone = { verified: "success", received: "accent", needs_review: "warning", missing: "danger", rejected: "danger" }; const statusLabel = { verified: "Verified", received: "Received", needs_review: "Needs review", missing: "Missing", rejected: "Rejected" }; return ( setSearch(typeof e === "string" ? e : e?.target?.value || "")} /> {loadingClients && } {!loadingClients && filteredClients.length === 0 && ( )} {filteredClients.map(client => (
